description: Guided (annealing + z3) search for multi-coordinate singular states
limitations: round-1 targeting only; deeper-round multi-hit not searched
annealing is heuristic; absence of large counts is not a proof
full-lattice singular reachability remains unproven either way

simulated_annealing.note: annealing over 64 rate-cell injections, maximizing round-1 coordinates equal to v_star.

summary.note: Guided search did NOT find a multi-coordinate singular state. Simulated annealing reached count=0 (an exact modular target is a needle-in-a-haystack for continuous search). z3 multi-cell (2,3,4 simultaneous) returned UNKNOWN (timeout) -- neither SAT nor UNSAT, hence unresolved, NOT a reachability or unreachability result. Only the single-coordinate Part V witness is confirmed. A full-lattice singular state requires controlling the 192 never-injected cells (impossible at round 0) and was not found.
